mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.user_id, u.student_no, u.real_name, p.current_stage_code, COALESCE(s.stage_name, p.current_stage_code) AS current_stage_name, p.current_step_code, COALESCE(t.step_name, p.current_step_code) AS current_step_name, p.updated_at FROM party_student_progress p INNER JOIN t_user u ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN party_stage_def s ON s.stage_code = p.current_stage_code LEFT JOIN party_step_def t ON t.step_code = p.current_step_code WHERE 1 = 1
AND p.current_stage_code = #{q.stageCode}
AND (u.real_name LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%' OR u.student_no LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.user_id, u.student_no, u.real_name, r.stage_code, r.title, r.content, r.file_id, r.submit_time, r.status, r.review_comment, r.reviewed_by, ru.real_name AS reviewer_name, r.reviewed_at FROM party_report r INNER JOIN t_user u ON u.id = r.user_id LEFT JOIN t_user ru ON ru.id = r.reviewed_by WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.status = #{q.status}
AND (u.real_name LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%' OR r.title LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY r.submit_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.user_id, u.student_no, u.real_name, a.title, a.reason, a.event_date, a.status, a.review_comment, ru.real_name AS reviewer_name, a.submit_time, a.reviewed_at FROM party_activity_application a INNER JOIN t_user u ON u.id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN t_user ru ON ru.id = a.reviewed_by WHERE 1 = 1
AND a.status = #{q.status}
AND (u.real_name LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%' OR a.title LIKE '%' || #{q.keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY a.submit_time DESC
